summary: CS Upgrade Pricing and Commission System - ALL TESTS PASSED (16/16 backend + All frontend). Verified: GET /api/cs/upgrade-packages returns 3 paths with correct prices/commissions, POST /api/cs/pitch-upgrade saves pitched data and moves student to pitched_for_upgrade, POST /api/cs/confirm-upgrade creates finance verification + CS commissions + LTV transaction and moves student to new_student, PATCH /api/students/{id}/student-code updates student_code field. Frontend: CS kanban with all columns, UpgradePricingModal with 3 paths and price options, commission info displayed, student_code input in detail modal.

issues:
Minor HTML nesting warning:
inside

in Badge component (non-breaking, cosmetic only)

passed_tests: Backend: test_get_upgrade_packages_returns_all_paths - All 3 paths returned
Backend: test_basic_to_intermediate_prices_and_commissions - 1600/1999/2105 with 75/100/150 AED commissions
Backend: test_intermediate_to_advanced_prices_and_commissions - 3599/3899/4100 with 75/150/200 AED commissions
Backend: test_basic_to_advanced_prices_and_commissions - 5600/6000/6500 with 150/250/350 AED commissions
Backend: test_head_commission_structure - 30 AED for basic/intermediate paths, 60 AED for basic_to_advanced
Backend: test_pitch_upgrade_requires_student - 404 for non-existent student
Backend: test_pitch_upgrade_requires_valid_path - 400 for invalid path
Backend: test_pitch_upgrade_requires_valid_price - 400 for invalid price
Backend: test_pitch_upgrade_success_and_stage_update - Student moved to pitched_for_upgrade
Backend: test_confirm_upgrade_creates_verification_record - Finance verification created
Backend: test_confirm_upgrade_creates_commissions - Agent and head commissions created
Backend: test_confirm_upgrade_moves_to_new_student - Student moved to new_student for re-activation
Backend: test_update_student_code - Student code updated successfully
Backend: test_student_code_can_be_cleared - Empty string accepted
Backend: test_student_code_invalid_student - 404 for non-existent student
Backend: test_all_commission_values_exact - All commission values match specification
Frontend: CS page loads at /cs with all 8 kanban columns
Frontend: UpgradePricingModal opens when changing stage to pitched_for_upgrade
Frontend: Modal shows 3 upgrade paths (Basic/Int, Int/Adv, Basic/Adv)
Frontend: Price options display correct values (1600/1999/2105 for Basic/Int)
Frontend: Agent commission info visible (AED 75/100/150)
Frontend: Student detail modal has editable Student ID input field
Frontend: Student cards show upgrade count badge (x5)
Frontend: Current Package and upgrade history displayed in detail modal

upgrade_packages_endpoint.details: GET /api/cs/upgrade-packages returns all 3 paths with correct prices and commissions

pitch_upgrade_endpoint.details: POST /api/cs/pitch-upgrade/{id} saves pitched data, moves student to pitched_for_upgrade stage

confirm_upgrade_endpoint.details: POST /api/cs/confirm-upgrade/{id} creates finance verification, agent/head commissions, LTV transaction, finance receivable, moves student to new_student

cs_kanban_columns.details: All 8 columns present: new_student, activated, satisfactory_call, pitched_for_upgrade, in_progress, interested, upgraded, not_interested

upgrade_pricing_modal.details: Modal opens on stage change, shows 3 paths with price options and commission info

student_code_display.details: Student ID input field in detail modal, editable and saves to backend

seed_data_creation: Using existing test student 'Samidha Hameed' (ID: f595bc32-bf3a-4838-8075-7c53d81cdab3) with 5 upgrades
context_for_next_testing_agent: CS Upgrade Pricing System fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/cs/upgrade-packages (GET), /api/cs/pitch-upgrade/{id} (POST), /api/cs/confirm-upgrade/{id} (POST), /api/students/{id}/student-code (PATCH). UpgradePricingModal opens when dragging to pitched_for_upgrade column or changing stage in detail modal. UpgradeConfirmPaymentModal opens when moving from pitched_for_upgrade to upgraded. Commission records are stored in cs_commissions collection. Finance verification records in finance_verifications collection.
testing_method: Backend pytest (16 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification
